markdown:
# Nature's Mantle

This cloak shifts color and texture to blend with the terrain surrounding you. While wearing the cloak, you can use it as a Spellcasting Focus for your Druid and Ranger spells.

While you are in an area that is [[lightly_obscured]], you can [[hide]] as a [[bonus_action]] even if you are being directly observed.

itemMetadata.reqAttune: Required by a druid or ranger
